title: RT322 Bella Bunny Rabbit 15" (37cm) Soft Teddy Bear Toy with Gift Box, Beige
features: A British designed soft toy for young children
Part of the Ragtales Bear and Bunny Tales collection
Produced usinghigh quality, luxury materials and high detail finishing.
description: Product Description Meet Posh Paws’ lovely Bear and Bunny Tales, from the Ragtales soft toy collection. There are three gorgeous teddy bear characters in the collection, and we’d like to introduce the beautiful Bella Rabbit teddy to you. Made from beautifully soft tousled fur, Bella the Rabbit is a gorgeous, super-soft and cuddly girl bunny teddy and has been made with jointed on the legs and with a weighted torso. Bella’s paws and the insides of her ears have smooth, velvety patches on them, perfect for little ones to hold onto and feel safe and comfortable with their best bunny friend. Bella Rabbit teddy soft toy measures approximately 15” in height (37cm) and has been produced using the most luxurious and high quality, softest materials and precision sewing techniques. Bella Rabbit has been made to last and is a premium gift for young children and Ragtales collectors. Suitable from birth. Bella Rabbit is packaged in a beautiful pink presentation gift box, so that she can be safely stored or transported, so that she doesn’t get damaged. Also available in the Ragtales Bear and Bunny Tales collection is Darcy Bear and Baby Darcy Bear teddies. Ragtales is a beautiful collection of British designed toys made with the understanding that children like to create fascinating and unique playtime adventures with their imaginations, which is why the range has been designed to accompany children on the journey through their early years. The Ragtales collection offers a variety of toys from baby ranges to ragdolls, teddy bears to wooden toys and characters all with true British heritage. Each Ragtales product has been made with gorgeous hand-picked fabrics, the softest velour, hand-knitted clothing, so that all the toys can become treasured companions during a child’s early years and beyond. To see the full range of Ragtales soft toys and gifts, visit the Posh Paws brand store: Amazon.co.uk/PoshPaws. Safety Warning Adult supervision may be required for young children Box Contains 1 x Bella Rabbit Doll See more
